channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Littler hits nine-darter in epic Matchplay win over Aspinall as MVG beaten
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Luke Littler and Nathan Aspinall produced a World Matchplay epic, with the world No 1 hitting a nine-darter on the way to a mesmerising 11-8 win at the Winter Gardens in Blackpool.

item.title: Jigawa gov reinstates 28 aides, appoints eight new officials
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Jigawa State Governor, Umar Namadi, reinstates 28 political aides and appoints 8 new officials to strengthen governance and service delivery in the state.
Read More: https://punchng.com/jigawa-gov-reinstates-28-aides-appoints-eight-new-officials/

item.title: Papers: Man Utd considering bid for PSG's Zaire-Emery
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

item.title: Decomposed body in singer D4vd’s car was ‘unrecognizable’, court hears
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The body of a teenage girl found in the trunk of US singer D4vd's car had been decomposed to the point it was "unrecognizable," a police detective testified in a Los Angeles court on Tuesday. The post Decomposed body in singer D4vd’s car was ‘unrecognizable’, court hears appeared f

item.title: Iraola wants Mac Allister & Alisson to stay with Reds
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Liverpool boss Andoni Iraola wants midfielder Alexis Mac Allister and goalkeeper Alisson to remain at the club.

item.title: Chelsea, Arsenal and Spurs all want Rashford - Wednesday's gossip
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: A trio of Premier League heavyweights all want Marcus Rashford, Arsenal are interested in Aston Villa's Ezri Konsa, and Nottingham Forest look set to sign a new defender.

item.description: UK resident was evacuated from Democratic Republic of the Congo where there is an outbreak of the diseaseA humanitarian worker is being monitored at a specialist hospital in London after potential exposure to the Ebola virus.The UK resident was medically evacuated from the Democratic Republic of the

item.title: What can Hearts pick from debris of ongoing summer of hurt?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: There's crashing back to Earth with a bang, and there's whatever Hearts fans have been going through since 16 May.

item.title: Yen Slides Past 163 Mark to Fresh Four-Decade Low Against Dollar
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The yen weakened past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986, raising the risk of intervention by authorities to prop up the currency.

item.title: Nigeria Congratulates Senegal’s Faye on Election as New ECOWAS Chairman
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Nigerian government has congratulated Senegal’s President Bassirou Diomaye Faye on his election as the new Chairman of the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS) Authority of Heads of State and Government. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs, in a statement by its spokesperson, Kimiebi I

item.title: France Passes Law Banning Social Media For Children Under 15
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: French lawmakers on Tuesday approved a landmark bill banning children under the age of 15 from using social media platforms, making France the first European Union country to adopt such a restriction. The legislation, which received overwhelming backing in parliament, now awaits President Emmanuel M

item.title: Hearts suffer chastening CL defeat in nightmare first game for Vrancken
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: New Hearts head coach Wouter Vrancken endured a nightmare debut as his side's Champions League hopes all but vanished with a 4-0 defeat against Sturm Graz.

item.title: I’ll wear ‘Akwete’ wrapper if my husband is re-elected as president — Oluremi Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
First Lady Oluremi Tinubu pledges to wear Akwete wrapper if President Bola Tinubu secures a second term, boosting local weaving industry with ₦2bn donation
Read More: https://punchng.com/ill-wear-akwete-wrapper-if-my-husband-is-re-elected-as-president-oluremi-tinubu/

item.title: Climate Crisis Now Human Rights Emergency, NHRC Declares
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) has declared climate change a full-blown human rights emergency in Nigeria, warning that the growing toll of floods, droughts, displacement and violent resource conflicts is threatening the fundamental rights of millions of citizens. The Commission said th

item.title: KKR Commercial Real Estate Lender Studies Potential Sale, Merger
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: A commercial real estate lender managed by KKR & Co. said it’s considering strategic alternatives that could include a merger or sale of the money-losing company.

item.title: Man Rescued Unhurt From Faulty Elevator On Lagos Island
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: An adult male was rescued unharmed after becoming trapped in a malfunctioning elevator in a three-storey building on Freeman Street, Zapass, Lagos Island East LCDA, on Tuesday The post Man Rescued Unhurt From Faulty Elevator On Lagos Island appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: Tinubu Congratulates UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham, Seeks Stronger Nigeria-UK Ties
item.dc:creator: Leadership

This was disclosed in a statement signed by the

item.description: Nasarawa State Governor, Abdullahi Sule, has defended President Bola Tinubu’s bid for re-election, insisting that the President’s record in office far surpasses those of other potential presidential contenders ahead of the 2027 general election. item.title: External reserves stand at $52bn – CBN gov, Cardoso
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Yemi Cardoso, says Nigeria’s foreign exchange reserves has presently risen to 52.52 billion dollars. The post External reserves stand at $52bn – CBN gov, Cardoso appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil edged higher after President Donald Trump played down the prospect of near-term talks with Iran while threatening further strikes, as risks to global supply spread beyond the Middle East to the Black Sea.

item.title: NDLEA Seizes ₦480bn Drugs, Arrests 77,859
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) says it arrested 77,859 suspected drug traffickers, including 240 major drug barons, and seized illicit drugs worth an estimated ₦480 billion between January 2021 and December 2025. The post NDLEA Seizes ₦480bn Drugs, Arrests 77,859 appeared first on

item.title: Asian Stocks Set for Gains as Chipmakers Rebound: Markets Wrap
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Stocks in Asia were set to gain on Wednesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial intelligence boom offset concerns over the renewed escalation in the US-Iran conflict.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu,has committed N2 billion to support the establishment of a modern weaving and research centre for an indigenous hand-woven fabric known as Akwete in Abia State. ‎ ‎At a civic reception in her honour at Township School, Akwete, Ukwa East local government area, yesterday, T

item.description: The Coalition of Civil Society Organisations for Good Governance has alleged that there is a plot to instigate violence in Osun State ahead of the August 15 governorship election as a pretext for declaring a state of emergency and removing Governor Ademola Adeleke from office. item.title: Hong Kong Home Prices Set for 19% Rebound Over Two Years: BI
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Hong Kong home prices are expected to rebound the most in nearly a decade in 2026, driven by strong mainland Chinese demand, limited supply and robust rental growth, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.

item.title: Draper misses out on US Open main draw - will have to qualify
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Former British No 1 Jack Draper is set to have to qualify for the US Open this year as the 2024 semi-finalist missed out on a spot in the main draw.

Jesus became the new head coach of Portugal on July 10 with a four-year contract, after the team’s 2026 campaign. The 71

Mbah also said the move was in line with his administration’s commitment to eradicating poverty and growing Enugu

item.title: Hundreds Flee As Wildfire Rips Through Southern France
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The fire swept through wooded hills in the Var region, burning 1,700 hectares (4,200 acres) in just a few hours and prompting the evacuation of nearly 400 people, the area's top official said. The post Hundreds Flee As Wildfire Rips Through Southern France appeared first on Channels Television.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Argentina goalkeeper, Emiliano Martinez, warned his teammates that they were guilty of employing cowardly tactics during their World Cup final loss to Spain. item.title: Banks Wrap Up Loan Backing SoftBank’s $5.4 Billion Robotics Bet
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: A group of banks wrapped up a loan offering backing SoftBank Group Corp.’s $5.4 billion robotics bet after increasing the size of the US dollar tranche.

item.title: How will Khalil al-Hayya’s leadership shape Hamas?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Newly named Hamas leader al-Hayya faces pressure to cede power amid Gaza's fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Zidane Agrees To Coach France Until 2030
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: French football legend Zinedine Zidane has reportedly agreed to become the next head coach of the French national team, signing a contract that will keep him in charge until June 2030. However, the French Football Federation is yet to announce the appointment officially. Transfer expert Fabrizio Rom

item.title: Real Madrid Have Signed A Phenomenon –Ex-Portugal Boss Hails Bernardo
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Former Portugal manager Fernando Santos has praised Bernardo Silva, calling him a phenomenon and asserting that Real Madrid fans will love his talent and tactical intelligence under José Mourinho. Santos, who managed Bernardo Silva at the international level, spoke highly of the player’s abili

item.title: Show HN: Browser Tools SDK – an optimal browser harness for agents
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: We’re open-sourcing Browser Tools SDK: a small TypeScript package to give any AI agent a reliable way to control a real browser. With just a few lines of code, you can give any agent a production-ready browser harness import { createAiSdkBrowserTools } from "libretto-browser-tools/ai-sdk"; import

item.title: This ETF Tax Loophole Is All the Rage Among Rich Americans
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: A bespoke fund is becoming a must-have tool for wealthy investors looking to defer — and sometimes even avoid — capital gains tax.

item.title: SpaceX’s stock snaps brutal losing streak ahead of key Starship rocket launch
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Plus, investors just found out when insiders can start dumping their shares.

item.title: NUPRC awards 37 oil blocks to 31 firms in 2026 licensing round
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The winners emerged at the commercial bid conference held on Tuesday at the Transcorp Event Centre, Abuja, marking the conclusion of the competitive phase of the licensing exercise. The post NUPRC awards 37 oil blocks to 31 firms in 2026 licensing round appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Edo closes case in suspected kidnappers’ trial
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Edo State Government closes its case in the trial of four suspected kidnappers, presenting evidence and witnesses in the special court. Read more on the Ed
Read More: https://punchng.com/edo-closes-case-in-suspected-kidnappers-trial/

item.title: I Don’t Play Or Negotiate With Bandits, Ododo Says
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Kogi State Governor, Usman Ododo, has said that he neither plays with nor negotiates with bandits in the state. The governor stated this on Tuesday while fielding questions from newsmen after a meeting with President Bola Tinubu alongside Senator Smart Adeyemi. Ododo, who commended the President for

item.title: Information Minister Urges Bloggers To Embrace Ethical Journalism
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Minister of Information and National Orientation, Mohammed Idris, has urged bloggers, online content creators and digital influencers to embrace ethical journalism, responsible storytelling and fact-based reporting to promote national development. The post Information Minister Urges Bloggers To

item.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

item.title: Gombe: FRSC laments increase in auto crash fatalities in six months
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Gombe State Command of the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) has disclosed that the road traffic crash data for the first six months of 2026 shows a drastic reduction in road traffic crashes with a rise in... The post Gombe: FRSC laments increase in auto crash fatalities in six months appeared f

item.title: Chelsea sign £117m Rogers - what will he bring?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Chelsea's £117m move for Aston Villa midfielder Morgan Rogers is a genuine transfer window shock - so how did they do it and what does it mean for the rest of the squad?
